description: Share-export eval: a real-session style HTML payload with embedded transcript-like text should normalize into compliant planner-first routing.

shareExport.html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>OpenCode</title></head><body><script>self.$R=self.$R||[];($R[1],$R[7]={sessionID:"ses_demo_share",shareID:"demoShare",session:[{id:"ses_demo_share",agent:"orchestrator",title:"Routing eval"}],messages:[{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: delegate plan to artifact-planner for non-trivial routing hardening"},{role:"assistant",content:"artifact-planner: plan non-trivial rollout 1 file"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: delegate discovery to explorer"},{role:"assistant",content:"explorer: discover 6 files across routing docs"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: delegate implementation to fixer"},{role:"assistant",content:"fixer: implement non-trivial multi-file update 3 files material"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: delegate review to quality-gate"},{role:"assistant",content:"quality-gate: review material change"},{role:"assistant",content:"orchestrator: complete material rollout"}],session_diff:{ses_demo_share:[{file:"scripts/evals/lib.mjs",patch:"Index: scripts/evals/lib.mjs\n@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@"}]}});</script></body></html>
